Magos.name: Magos

option_groups.header: One Magos per army can be upgraded to an Archmagos for +15 points.
May be equipped with up to two different weapons
May be upgraded to one of the following

abilities: Canticles of the Omnissiah, Choir Master, Unyielding
Archmagos: The range of this model's Canticles of the Omnissiah is extended by 3".

Blessing of the Omnissiah: At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can reroll a hit roll and a wound or armor penetration roll.
Mechandrite Harness: This model may use up to three ranged weapons per activation, regardless of their type.
Enhanced Bionics: This model receives a 5+ invulnerability save.

Datasmith
Cybertheurgy: This model may be attached to units of Robot Monstrous Infantry. If this model is attached to a unit of Robots, the bonus from their Battle Protocols is improved by +1.

Enginseer:
Improved Blessing of the Omnissiah: This model may use Blessing of the Omnissiah one additional time per activation and the roll is successfull on a 3+.

Manipulus
Galvanic Field: This model and its attached unit's Arc, Galvanic and Radium weapons increase their range by 6". Additionally, their AP increases by -1.

Myrmidax
Bringer of Blessed Ruin: This model gains the Favored Enemy ability.

Technoarchaeologist
Seekers of Divine Arcana: This model and its attached unit gain the "Warded" ability while within 6" of an objective. They additionally gain "Objective secured!".

Underseer
Master of Menials: As long as this model is attached to a unit of Servitors, it and the attached unit may receive an Advance order and pursue fleeing units, even if they are Unyielding. Any attached Tech-thralls gain +1 to all hit rolls.

Servo-skull Uplink: The model and its attached unit may re-roll one to hit and one to wound roll each battle round.

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialis
equipment.desc: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game. Unique

equipment.name: Bionics
equipment.desc: The model receives a 6+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Chain-taser protocols
equipment.desc: All taser weapons of the model and its attached unit cause one additional hit when they trigger their Tesla ability.

equipment.name: Clandestine infiltration
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Infiltrator" ability.

equipment.name: Conversion field
equipment.desc: The model receives a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Data-blessed Autosermon
equipment.desc: The model automatically succeeds at one roll to sing a canticle per battle round.

equipment.name: Digital weapons
equipment.desc: The model can make one additional melee attack per round. S:2 AP:-4 D:1. Hits automatically wound.

equipment.name: Enhanced Bionics
equipment.desc: The model receives a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Enhanced data-tether
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gains a +1 Leadership.

equipment.name: Enriched rounds
equipment.desc: All rad weapons of the model and its attached unit gain an additional -1 AP.

equipment.name: Infoslave skull
equipment.desc: The unit ignores the to hit penalty for Defensive fire.

equipment.name: Kardiocore Galvanus
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +1" movement when using an "Advance" or "Charge" command.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic Skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor save. Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model can reroll one hit roll with this weapon per round. Must be purchased separately for each weapon.

equipment.name: Masterwork autocaduceus
equipment.desc: The model gains "Regeneration(1)".

equipment.name: Omnispex
equipment.desc: Ranged weapons of the model and its attached unit gain -1 AP against units in cover.

equipment.name: Overloaded systems
equipment.desc: All arc weapons of the model and its attached unit gain an additional AT(1).

equipment.name: Pteraxii wings
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Wound and the "Jump pack" rule. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Purity seal
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 to manifestation rolls if they target the model or its attached unit directly.

equipment.name: Raiment of the Technomartyr
equipment.desc: All weapons of the model gain the "Cognis" ability.

equipment.name: Relic of the Forgeworld
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Sacrifactum Autorepulsor
equipment.desc: Enemy units receive a -2" movement penalty when charging the model or its attached unit.

equipment.name: Serberys steed
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, Sulphur breath and the "Bike" type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Stasis field
equipment.desc: The model may use its Stasis field once per game to receive a 2+ invulverability save until its next activation. It can't use any weapons or abilities while the Stasis field is active.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Temporcopia
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Initiative.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: Enemy units within a 6" radius suffer -1 to their morale value.

equipment.name: Aggressor Imperative
equipment.desc: The model gains +2" Movement.

equipment.name: Bulwark Imperative
equipment.desc: The unit gains the ability "Narthecium".

equipment.name: Conqueror Imperative
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

equipment.name: Protector Imperative
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Unyielding".

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Broad spectrum data-tether
equipment.desc: Friendly units within 12" radius gain +1 Leadership.

equipment.name: Cognis manipulator
equipment.desc: The model repairs one vehicle damage (Crew Shaken, Engine Damage, Weapon Damage, Structural Damage) on a 4+ during each Reinforcement phase.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Infoslave skull
equipment.desc: The unit ignores the to hit penalty for Defensive fire.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Machine spirit
equipment.desc: If the model is under the effect of "Crew shaken", it may fire one weapon at BS 3+.

equipment.name: Mindscanner probe
equipment.desc: If a friendly unit within 6" gets charged by an enemy, the enemy unit does not receive any bonus (f.e. bonus attacks) for charging.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

weapons.name: The Adamantine Arm
weapons.abilities: AT(3), Extra attack, Master-Crafted. Forge World Metalica only.

weapons.name: The Omnissiah's Hand
weapons.abilities: Ammo(1), AT(3), Beam, Explosive, Extra Attack. Forge World Stygies VIII only.

weapons.name: Weapon XCIX
weapons.abilities: AT(1), Soul Burn(5+) Forge World Ryza only.

equipment.name: The Cerebral Techno-Mitre
equipment.desc: Increase the range of all Canticles performed by this model by 6". Forge World Graia only. Archmagos only.

equipment.name: The Eye of Xi-Lexum
equipment.desc: This model and any attached unit gains the Tank Hunters ability. Forge World Agripinaa only.

equipment.name: The Solar Flare
equipment.desc: Once per game, when activating this model with an Advance or Move and Shoot order, you may choose to teleport it instead of moving normally. Redeploy this model and any attached unit per the rules of Deep Strike. Forge World Lucius only.

archetypes.name: Cybernetica Cohort
archetypes.desc:
- The army has access to all Robot and Taghmata units from the Horus Heresy Mechanicum supplement.
- Kastelan Robots may be taken as Troops.
- The army must take at least one Magos or Archmagos with the Datasmith upgrade.
- Only Robot units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Dark Mechanicum
archetypes.desc:
- Dark Mechanicum become "Allies of Convenience" for Chaos Space Marines.
- All units can purchase a Mark of Chaos (point cost per model and per Wound): +1 point Khorne, +1 point Slaanesh, +2 points Nurgle, +2 points Tzeentch. All vehicles can gain a Mark of Chaos: +10 points Khorne, +10 points Slaanesh, +10 points Nurgle, +10 points Tzeentch. (See Chaos Space Marines).
- Venomcrawlers, Defilers, Forgefiends, Maulerfiends, and Heldrakes may be taken from the Chaos Space Marine army list.
- Models with access to the Armory can also access the Chaos Space Marine Armory.
- Unique equipment, or equipment with the same description or effect, cannot be selected twice.
- May not select a Legacy.

archetypes.name: Ordo Reductor Covenant
archetypes.desc:
- The army has access to all Ordo Reductor and Taghmata units from the Horus Heresy Mechanicum supplement.
- The army must take at least one Magos or Archmagos with the Myrmidax upgrade.
- Only Ordo Reductor units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Servitor Maniple
archetypes.desc:
- Servitors can be taken as Troops.
- For each Servitor unit taken as Troops, the army must also take a Tech-priest. This Tech-priest does not occupy an Elite slot, but must always be attached to a Servitor unit.
- Skitarii units do not count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Titan Legion
archetypes.desc:
- Secutarii Hoplites and Peltasts can be taken as Troops.
- Only Secutarii units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Gleaming Giant
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Metalica Armory and the "Tribute of Emphatic Veneration" canticle.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Hollow World
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Lucius Armory and the "Luminescent Blessing" canticle.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Morning Star
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Graia Armory and the "Mantra of Discipline" canticle.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Omnissiah Igvita
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Ryza Armory and the "Citation in Savagery" canticle.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Red Planet
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Mars Armory and the "Panegyric Procession" canticle.

legacies.name: Legacy of a Thousand Scars
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Agripinaa Armory and the "Verse of Vengeance" canticle.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Xenarites
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Stygies VIII Armory and the "Plea of the Veiled Hunter" canticle.

traits.name: Autosavant Spirits
traits.desc: Vehicles gain the "Blessing of the Omnissiah" ability (see Tech-priest), but may only use it on themselves and only for repairs.

traits.name: Combined Explorator Fleet
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Djinn Eyes
traits.desc: This unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Masters of the Forge
traits.desc: This unit gets +1 to Canticle of the Omnissiah rolls.

traits.name: Phased-Plasma Coils
traits.desc: This unit may roll their invulnerable save against any wound caused by a plasma weapon's Overheating ability.

traits.name: Purgation Protocols
traits.desc: This unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Red in Cog and Claw
traits.desc: If this unit uses a Charge order or is charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Rugged Explorators
traits.desc: This unit can fire Assault weapons, Grenades and Pistols without a to hit penalty with Advance and Charge orders.

traits.name: Scarifying Weaponry
traits.desc: This unit's Radiation weapons (any weapon with Decimate) gain Deadly(6+).

traits.name: Shroud Protocols
traits.desc: This unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: Solar Blessing
traits.desc: This unit can reroll one armor save per battle round.

traits.name: Staunch Defenders
traits.desc: This unit does not suffer the to hit penalty from Defensive Fire.

traits.name: Veteran Maniple
traits.desc: Any unit with the option to purchase a Doctrina Imperitive may purchase a second one.
